author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source guide-shell routing snippets across docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: guide-shell routing snippets are copied with small variations across README.md:26-34, docs/README.md:7-15, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md:112-121, AGENTS.md:17-23, and docs/COMMANDS.md:3-11. Each tells agents to install guide-shell and run pm guide topics, but the topic lists differ (skills, sdk, release, --json), making guide-topic changes easy to miss. Existing pm-rjgh includes AGENTS tightening but not the repeated guide-shell snippets across all entrypoints.

One docs entrypoint owns the canonical guide-shell snippet; other pages use short pointers or task-specific single commands; guide topic examples stay aligned with runtime contracts; docs-skills gate passes.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'guide-shell routing snippets README docs AGENT_GUIDE COMMANDS pm guide duplicated' found broad parent/docs history but no active exact item for guide-shell snippet dedup.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for guide-shell docs snippets
